verifiedBy: live-truth agent (re-verified in the 2026-06-29 doc-hygiene pass via az CLI + az MCP)
notes: READ-ONLY ground-truth snapshot. No secrets/tokens stored. Re-verified in the 2026-06-29 doc-hygiene pass: functionCounts, gates, graphSubscriptions, mailboxRbac and httpsOnly all still match live. One change since the prior snapshot — PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED=true was found live on both apps and added to gates (it was unrecorded). postgresCounts remain unverified (PG firewall + no local psql). docDrift notes that referenced an OLDER CLAUDE.md are marked RESOLVED where the current docs already align.

functionCounts.sourceCommand: az functionapp function list -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n <app> --query 'length(@)' -o tsv
functionCounts.docDrift: RESOLVED in the doc-hygiene pass: live orch=42, api=44 re-confirmed. Forward docs registry-link the count; the residual '41/42' embeds in docs/azure/diagnose.md + docs/azure/deploy.md were corrected to 42/44.

graphSubscriptions.sourceCommand: client_credentials token for app 5d37a155-... (secret from KV cespk-pg-kv-dev/graph-client-secret) -> GET https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/subscriptions
graphSubscriptions.docDrift: RESOLVED: 2 live push subscriptions exist for engineers@ + digital@ Inbox, pushing to graph-webhook, expiring 2026-07-05 — re-confirmed live in the doc-hygiene pass. The current CLAUDE.md / live-environment.md already state '2 live push subscriptions'; the earlier 'no Graph subscriptions exist' wording has been corrected.

mailboxRbac.docDrift: RESOLVED: re-confirmed engineers@ + digital@ scoped (200), info@ + desk@ not scoped (403). The current docs already state this per-mailbox; the earlier blanket 'mailboxes not yet RBAC-scoped' claim has been corrected.

subscriptionRenewalRisk.sourceCommand: az monitor app-insights query --app <cespk-orch-dev appId> --analytics-query "union traces,requests,customEvents | where timestamp>ago(3d) | where ... contains 'graph-renew'"
subscriptionRenewalRisk.note: KQL query succeeded (table returned, 0 rows). No observable graph-renew execution in the last 3 days despite subscriptions expiring in ~7 days. Either the renewal timer logs under a different name or it is not firing — flag for follow-up; subscriptions will silently lapse on 2026-07-05 if renewal is not running.

postgresCounts.sourceCommand: mcp__azure__postgres postgres_database_query (server cespk-pg-dev, db collisionspike, MicrosoftEntra)
postgresCounts.reason: host not in pg firewall allowlist — MCP egress IP 51.142.242.153 could not connect to cespk-pg-dev:5432 (NpgsqlException 'Failed to connect'). Counts NOT verified; do not treat doc-stated counts (work_provider 390, repairer 32, image_source 19, inspection_address 2209, case_ 0) as confirmed by this snapshot.

httpsOnly.sourceCommand: az resource show -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n <app> --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites --query properties.httpsOnly -o tsv
httpsOnly.note: az functionapp show --query httpsOnly returned null (property not surfaced by that path); az resource show confirmed true for both.

boxSmoke.docDrift: Box JWT auth is LIVE and working: authenticated REST call to the allowed root (folder id 392761581105) returned 200 with a real case folder (CCPY26050). Consistent with memory note 'Box went LIVE 2026-06-28'. CLAUDE.md claim that all BOX_* gates are/​remain false is STALE (see gates).

gates.sourceCommand: az functionapp config appsettings list -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n <app> --query "[?contains(name,'BOX_')||contains(name,'EVA_')||contains(name,'ENRICHMENT')||contains(name,'VALUATION')||name=='GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES']"
gates.docDrift: BOX_API_ENABLED, BOX_FOLDER_AT_INTAKE_ENABLED, BOX_FILEREQUEST_ENABLED are all 'true' on BOTH api and orch — Box is ACTIVATED, not off. ENRICHMENT_ENABLED and PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED are 'true' on both. EVA_API_ENABLED, VALUATION_ENABLED, BOX_EMBED_ENABLED, BOX_METADATA_ENABLED are not set (effectively off/reserved). GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES = engineers@ + digital@ (minIntakeDate 2026-06-27). NOTE: PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED=true was unrecorded before the 2026-06-29 re-verification; CLAUDE.md's gate list describes default-off SEMANTICS, not current live values.

coreLiveResources: cespike-parser-dev-x7xt3d5ovhi7y, cespkenrich-fn-gi62sd, cespkeva-fn-ufa3ci, cespkeval-fn-6c6fxd, cespkocr-fn-dev-glju3v (retained Python fns)

csvComparison.sourceCommand: cut -d',' -f1 on both CSVs vs mcp__azure__group_resource_list output
csvComparison.recommendation: Both root CSVs are STALE/superseded — they predate the API/orchestration/SPA/Postgres/Box/Foundry deployment and omit all of those core live resources. Safe to delete; the live registry (docs/architecture/live-environment.md) + mcp__azure__group_resource_list are authoritative.
